name: Aditya Nair
title: Senior Data Engineer
summary: Software / data professional with 2.4 years of experience building data pipelines, backend systems, and analytics infrastructure. I've been the engineer who makes ML possible by getting the data pipelines right; now I want to do more of the ML itself. My toolkit is solid on the data engineering side — Python, SQL, Spark, Airflow, warehouse design — and I've completed a couple of self-directed ML projects (Kaggle competitions, side projects fine-tuning small models). Interested in transitioning toward more AI/ML-focused work, ideally at a company where I can leverage my existing data-infra skills while learning modern ML practice.

explainability.why_selected: 2.4 years experience in Senior Data Engineer with AWS. Strong recruiter responsiveness (31%), minor concern: 60-day notice.
explainability.recruiter_notes: Candidate has 2.4 years of experience and 8 skills. Notice period: 60 days. Expected salary: 30.0 LPA. Priority level: Medium.
